_description: User raw story and world inputs. Filled by the user in the app before starting the style integration or scenario development.
world_type: Contemporary drama with dark comedy undertones
tone: Dry, deadpan, emotionally honest. Humor comes from character contradictions, not situations.
rules: No superpowers. No genre conventions. Only human behavior.
Characters never say exactly what they mean.
Silence is a valid panel. Use it.
core_conflict: A rigid need for order and predictability is challenged when a chaotic element (a real, green-dyed flamingo) is introduced into a mundane apartment, forcing a confrontation with family history and the unpredictable absurdity of life.
